[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0000000000 a
2 0000101101 4
3 0110100111 6
4 0101000111 5
5 0000101000 2
6 1110100001 5
7 0000101101 4

01 10 0000100101 3
12 21 0100000111 4
23 32 0000000000 a match 0 1
34 43 0000100000 1
45 54 0000100001 2
56 65 0000000000 a match 0 1
67 76 0100000000 1
70 07 0000000100 1

02 20 0000000101 2
13 31 0000100000 1
24 42 0100000001 2
35 53 0000101000 2 match 5
46 64 1100000000 2
57 75 0000000100 1
60 06 0000000000 a match 0 1
71 17 0110000100 3

03 30 0000101000 2 match 5
14 41 0110100001 4
25 52 0000000101 2
36 63 0000000000 a match 0 1
47 74 0110000000 2
50 05 0000101101 4 match 2 7
61 16 0100000000 1
72 27 0100000100 2

04 40 0000100001 2
15 51 0000100101 3
26 62 0100000000 1
37 73 0000000000 a match 0 1
